channel.title: Wing Luke Museum
channel.description: Upcoming events for Wing Luke Museum

item.title: 2026 SHISHIMAI LION DANCE BLESSING
item.description:
Sunday, March 29, 2026 at 2 PM

Join members of the neighborhood Choeizan Enkyoji Nichiren Buddhist Temple on Sunday, March 29, from 2pm as they bring the shishimai blessing dance on-site in the Museum's Welcome Hall.   This event is free and in-person.

Event details
